title: ervum humile
intro: Ervum humile, also known as Chickling Vetch, is a perennial legume plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Ervum humile include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce the risk of certain diseases, such as cardiovascular disease. Ervum humile can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
